```scala
import scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer

def solve(n: Long): String = {
    def convertToBase(num: Int, base: Int): String = {
        if (num == 0) "0"
        val digits = ListBuffer[String]()
        var n = num
        while (n > 0) {
            val remainder = n % base
            val ch = if (remainder < 10) (remainder + '0').toChar else (remainder - 10 + 'A').toChar
            digits += ch.toString
            n = n / base
        }
        digits.reverse.mkString
    }
    val n2 = n * n
    val n3 = n * n * n
    val hex = n2.toHexString.toUpperCase
    val base36 = convertToBase(n3.toInt, 36)
    hex + base36
}
```
